_comment:
thresholds.json — Smart Disaster Command Center
HARD OPERATIONAL THRESHOLD: water_level_above_danger_m > 1.5m is a required danger-line query rule (FIN100 assignment requirement). Do NOT change.
DISPLAY SEVERITY TIERS: percentile-based. Recalibrate with calibrate_thresholds.py.

hard_operational._note: REQUIRED: This 1.5m threshold is used for AI assistant queries like 'water levels have exceeded the danger line by more than 1.5 meters'. This is a hard operational rule — never change it.

display_severity_tiers._note: These are display-only thresholds for the dashboard map and table. They use percentile-based calibration so the distribution is operationally meaningful: Low=bottom 40%, Moderate=40-70%, High=70-90%, Critical=top 10%.

flood._note: Water level thresholds for flood severity classification in the AI rule engine
